deploymentTarget.description: Optional future provider selector. Current stop_job uses Flink REST and does not require a provider.

httpHostHeader.description: Optional HTTP Host header for NodePort or ingress access without DNS.

verify.description: Read back the target job after the stop request and report whether it is no longer RUNNING.

expectedTargetLock.description: Optional target fingerprint from a prior dry-run. Mismatch fails with TargetLockMismatch.
